questions.question:
다음을 모두 포함할 수 있는 단어로 가장 적절한 것은?
math 	music 	science 	English
다음 중 두 단어의 의미 관계가 나머지 셋과 다른 것은?

빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
He 	very sick yesterday.

대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : I have to clean my room. Can you help me?
B : 	.

대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : How 	members are there in your club?
B : There are twenty members.

대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : 	?
B : I go to school at eight thirty.
choices: ② How do you go to school
③ What did you have for lunch
④ What time do you go to school

questions.question: 그림이 의미하는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?

다음 대화의 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What do you usually do on the weekend?
B : I 	basketball with my friends.
A : Where do you 	?
B : In the school gym.

그래프로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
is the most popular food for Daehan Middle
School students.
다음 대화에서 B가 제안을 거절한 이유는?

다음 대화에서 밑줄 친 말의 의도로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Mom, I finished my homework.
B : Can I see it?
A : Of course. Here it is. What do you think?
B : Wonderful! You did really well!

다음 대화에서 A가 찾아가려는 위치로 옳은 것은?
A : Excuse me. Can you tell me where the bank is?
B : Go straight two blocks and turn left.
It’s on your right.
A : Thank you.
choices: ① Go straight two blocks and turn left.
② Go straight two blocks and turn right.
③ Turn left and go straight two blocks.
④ Turn right and go straight two blocks.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 언급된 내용이 아닌 것은?
I go to the library every weekend with my family.
We 	read 	lots 	of 	books 	there. 	My 	dad 	and 	I 	like
reading novels. My mom and my younger sister like
reading comic books.
choices: ② 나는 주말마다 가족과 도서관에 간다.
③ 아버지와 나는 소설 읽기를 좋아한다.
④ 어머니와 여동생은 만화책 읽기를 좋아한다.
questions.passage:
I go to the library every weekend with my family.
We read lots of books there. My dad and I like
reading novels. My mom and my younger sister like
reading comic books.

questions.question:
다음 안내 방송이 이루어진 장소로 가장 적절한 것은?
Ladies and gentlemen! The train is now arriving at
Seoul Station. We hope you have enjoyed your trip.
Please make sure that you take all your bags when
you leave. Thank you.

그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Tony is running 	than Mike.

Jim Abbott에 관한 다음 글의 내용에서 알 수 없는 것은?
Jim 	Abbott 	was 	born 	on 	September 	19, 	1967 	in
America without a right hand, but he really liked baseball.
He practiced every day to be a good baseball player.
Later, Jim Abbott became a famous baseball player.
questions.passage:
Jim Abbott was born on September 19, 1967 in
America without a right hand, but he really liked baseball.
He practiced every day to be a good baseball player.
Later, Jim Abbott became a famous baseball player.

questions.question:
그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Jenny is 	in the park with
her dog.

다음 편지에 나타난 ‘I’의 고민으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Dear Susan,
I want to be a nurse. When I go to college, I’d like
to study nursing and become a nurse. But my parents
want me to be an engineer. I don’t want to be an
engineer when I grow up. What should I do?
Jane
choices: ② 시간 관리를 잘 하지 못해서
④ 장래 희망 직업이 부모의 의견과 달라서

questions.question:
안내문에서 박물관 관람 시 지켜야 할 규칙으로 언급되지
않은 것은?
∙ Don’t run.
∙ Don’t take pictures.
∙ Don’t bring food inside.

다음 중 밑줄 친 them이 가리키는 것으로 적절한 것은?
Jisu makes delicious cookies. She sometimes brings
her cookies to class and gives them to us. I ate her
cookies yesterday. They were so good!

다음 대화의 마지막 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What’s the matter? You look sad.
B : My mother is in hospital. She is very sick. I’m so
worried.
A : 	.
choices: ④ I’m sorry to hear that

questions.question:
다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
I bought a shirt for my dad at your shop yesterday, but
he doesn’t like the color. Can I exchange it for a black
one? Please let me know if it is possible. Thanks.
questions.passage:
I bought a shirt for my dad at your shop yesterday, but
he doesn't like the color. Can I exchange it for a black
one? Please let me know if it is possible. Thanks.

questions.question:
다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
If you want to get good grades, it is important to set
goals and study every day. It is also a good idea to
study together with your friends. This will help you
get good grades.
questions.passage:
If you want to get good grades, it is important to set
goals and study every day. It is also a good idea to
study together with your friends. This will help you
get good grades.

questions.question:
다음 글 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
There are a lot of mountains in the world. Many people
like to climb to the top of the mountains. However, climbing mountains can be dangerous. When you climb
mountains, you need to follow these safety rules.
choices: ④ 등산할 때 지켜야 할 안전 수칙
questions.passage:
There are a lot of mountains in the world. Many people
like to climb to the top of the mountains. However,
climbing mountains can be dangerous. When you climb
mountains, you need to follow these safety rules.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 John이 지난 일요일에 한 일은?
John got up early last Sunday. He had breakfast and
went out to exercise in the playground. In the afternoon,
he read a book about Korean history. In the evening,
he did his homework.
questions.passage:
John got up early last Sunday. He had breakfast and
went out to exercise in the playground. In the afternoon,
he read a book about Korean history. In the evening,
he did his homework.
